title: Network Scanner Tool
description: A comprehensive network scanning utility built with Python that identifies active hosts, open ports, and services. Features real-time monitoring and detailed reporting capabilities for security assessments.

title: Vulnerability Assessment Platform
description: Full-stack web application for automated vulnerability scanning and tracking. Includes CVE database integration, remediation tracking, and executive reporting features.

title: Malware Detection System
description: Machine learning powered malware detection system using static and dynamic analysis techniques. Achieved 95% accuracy rate on test datasets with low false positive rates.

title: Secure Messaging App
description: End-to-end encrypted messaging application with zero-knowledge architecture. Implements perfect forward secrecy and includes self-destructing messages feature.
